payload.title: “Connect to a remote” flow in the local app (no CLI)
payload.description: A button in the local app to bind this board: enter hub URL + API key, pick or create a project, → write .scope/remote.json (non-secret) + store the key in a machine-local credentials file (NOT .scope, which is committed) + start the RemoteSyncAgent. Plus a Disconnect action. Mirrors `scope remote set` + key, but in the UI.
